description: The flame white colour of this 100% polyester t-shirt makes it a perfect lifestyle as well as a Sports wear. Look good while you play great!t-shirts or & ldquo Tees& rdquo as they are called have become an essential part of our dressing. No one really has remained untouched by the influence of t-shirts. The comfort, ease of use and variety that a t-shirt offers makes it the most preferred casual wear. It goes well with jeans, pants, shorts & ndash almost anything that one can think of. There are t-shirts available in various fits and sizes for men. While doing your everyday activities, as daily wear or as Friday dressing to office, there's a none better choice than a t-shirt. T-shirts also come with terrific designs on it and are available in various colours. Feel good, feel light and have a great time as your slip into your very own t-shirt.
